title: Well-Known Labels, Annotations and Taints — kube-scheduler-simulator.sigs.k8s.io/reserve-result
text:
Type: Annotation
Example:
kube-scheduler-simulator.sigs.k8s.io/reserve-result: '{"VolumeBinding":"success"}'
Used on: Pod
This annotation records the result of reserve scheduler plugins, used by
https://sigs.k8s.io/kube-scheduler-simulator
.

Type: Annotation
Example:
kube-scheduler-simulator.sigs.k8s.io/result-history: '[]'
Used on: Pod
This annotation records all the past scheduling results from scheduler plugins, used by
https://sigs.k8s.io/kube-scheduler-simulator
.
